nasb.text: So the Levites calmed all the people, saying, “Be still, for the day is holy; do not be grieved.”

esv.text: So the Levites calmed all the people, saying, “Be quiet, for this day is holy; do not be grieved.”

cnv.text: 於是利未人使眾民安靜下來，說：“你們安靜吧，因為今天是聖日，也不要再憂愁！”

ccb.text: 利未人使全体民众安静，说：“请安静，因为今天是圣日。不要悲伤。”
